productDisplayName: John Players Men Solid White Shirt
description: Style Note A man's wardrobe is incomplete without that perfect bright white shirt and john players takes care of that need with applomb. This clean white shirt is the perfect formal complement for your dark trousers and formal shoes when the look you are going for is sharp and suave! Product Details Bright white shirt with a narrow collar, full buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a patch pocket on the left chest Material and Care Blended cotton Machine wash cold using a mild detergent Tumble dry low Dry flat in shade inside out Use warm iron Do not bleach Size and Fit John Players' contemporary fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size 40
